title: Facilitator Guide — Day 11 — Opportunity Analysis
prepChecklist: Review squad Week 2 validation evidence — reference in debrief
Print entrepreneur lens worksheets and platform stack templates
Brief mentors: this is venture discovery, not product training
Prepare whiteboard for platform stack diagram

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 — From Financial Literacy to Financial Entrepreneurship
sessionFlow.notes: Tell the three-week story. Pause on the zero-capital question. Reveal the advisory practice. Do not pitch AIA yet — frame as platform.
Why millions struggle. Who helps. Entrepreneur lens: market, problem, demand, impact, income.

sessionFlow.activity: Could YOUR venture be YOU? + platform stack
sessionFlow.notes: Draw YOU → Skills → AIA Platform → Clients → Income → Business → Leadership → Enterprise.

sessionFlow.activity: Reflection + Day 12 preview (Your First Business Tool)

debriefQuestions: When did the room shift from 'internship' to 'venture'?
Who still sees AIA as an employer vs a platform?
How does Week 1 discovery connect to this business model?
commonPitfalls: Teaching what financial advisors do instead of why it's a great business
Introducing products or compensation too early
Skipping the pause before the zero-capital reveal
coachingTips: Speak SPIKE — entrepreneurs think in market, problem, demand, impact, income
Use Week 2 interview quotes as proof during opportunity analysis
